description: Order is paid but not yet shipped (#1003). Agent should say so without inventing a ship date.

conversation.content: Hej, var är min order #1003? Email sara@example.se. Beställde igår.

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in Swedish. Confirms the order #1003. Clearly states the order has not yet been shipped (no tracking number yet). Does NOT invent a ship date. Does NOT claim it's in transit. May offer to follow up when it ships or mention typical processing time as a range, but must not promise a specific date.
